titleStmt.title: SII 15.541: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 541. (B.K. No. 38 of 1929-30.) KUṆṬŌJI, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a mutilated slab built into the south wall of the Īśvara temple.

The extant portion of the inscription contains details regarding the boundaries of the gift-land and the imprecation. In the former context Bidirkkunde is mentioned. The main part of the epigraph is missing.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nairityadalu bidi¨rkkuṁdeya sīmeyiṁdalu
ḍuvalu bidi¨rkkuṁdeya mūḍaṇasīme vāyavya
taddaya sīmeya kaṇiya paḷḷa baḍagalu mūḍalu
ṇiya paḷḷadalu kūḍida nānalvaḷḷada yūḍalu Ā nānalva
ḷḷada mūḍaṇa taleyalu naṭṭa sāsanagallu kkuṁṭṭe naḍuguppe
mūḍalūroḍeyara mānyada nairityadalu naṭṭa sāsanagallu
Intī dha¨rmmamaṁ Arasugaḷuṁ manneyaruṁ pratipāḷisi rakṣisuvaru
Ī dha¨rmmakke yārānumanyāyamaṁ cintisuva¨rgge vāraṇāsiyalu
vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarumaṁ kavilegaḷaṁ svahastadalu konda
pāpavakkuṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . bahubhi¨rvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhi
ssagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . sāmānyō
yaṁ dhu¨rmmasēta¨rnṟupāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhissa¨rvvānētānbhāvinaḥ
pā¨rtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svasti
Digital edition of SII 15.541 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
